files.content:
Alert Message Headline
This is the subtext for your alert message, providing important information or instructions.

visual_summary: A rectangle with rounded corners, containing an icon and two lines of text. Useful for displaying important information or actions.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: alert
Description: A rectangle with rounded corners, containing an icon and two lines of text. Useful for displaying important information or actions.
Style: rounded, bordered, white-bg
Interactions: 
Tags: alert, message, notification

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/alert.html
<div class="relative w-full rounded-lg border bg-white p-4 [&>svg]:absolute [&>svg]:text-foreground [&>svg]:left-4 [&>svg]:top-4 [&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px] [&:has(svg)]:pl-11 text-neutral-900">
